blended.narrative: Marmot Basin is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,932 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

Friday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
